final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing classical oil painting portrait of a contemporary urban professional woman, rendered in the manner of Dutch Golden Age master Rembrandt van Rijn.

Style/medium: classical oil painting, Dutch Golden Age tradition, Rembrandt chiaroscuro technique, impasto brushwork with visible thick paint texture, museum-quality finish
Composition: bust-to-torso portrait, centered subject, tight framing that draws all attention to the face and hands, shallow depth of field implied by dark background
Subject: East Asian woman approximately 35 years old, wearing a dark formal suit jacket, expression intelligent and resolute; left hand holding a thick heavy book with finely rendered knuckles and skin texture
Scene/backdrop: near-featureless deep brown dark ground, almost no background detail, all visual weight on the figure
Lighting/mood: classic Rembrandt lighting — single warm directional light source illuminating the face, forming the characteristic triangular highlight on one cheek, the opposite side of the face receding into soft shadow; mood is solemn, dignified, quietly powerful
Color palette: dominant tones of burnt umber, raw sienna, deep ochre, and dark crimson; warm white reserved exclusively for the facial highlight zone; no bright colors elsewhere
Materials/textures: heavy impasto oil paint with clearly visible brushstrokes and ridges of pigment; skin rendered with translucent glazing layers; fabric of the suit with dense dark texture; book cover with worn leather-like surface
Constraints: the Rembrandt triangle highlight must be clearly legible; background must remain nearly detail-free; hand and book rendering must show individual knuckle and skin-pore texture
Avoid: photographic realism, digital illustration flatness, modern lighting rigs, cool blue tones, overexposed highlights, generic stock-portrait composition, decorative background elements
